subject: [PATCH v2 08/13] sunrpc: add netlink upcall for the auth.unix.ip cache

2026-03-25.patch_summary: This patch adds netlink-based cache upcall support for the ip_map (auth.unix.ip) cache in the sunrpc subsystem. It introduces new attributes and operations to the sunrpc_cache YAML spec, including ip-map attribute-set and ip-map-reqs wrapper. The patch also implements two new functions: sunrpc_nl_ip_map_get_reqs_dumpit() to snapshot pending requests and send them over netlink, and sunrpc_nl_ip_map_set_reqs_doit() to parse responses from userspace and update the cache. Additionally, it wires up the ip_map_notify() callback in ip_map_cache_template to trigger SUNRPC_CMD_CACHE_NOTIFY multicast events on cache misses.
